description_long: This infant bed features a sturdy rectangular frame constructed primarily from painted wood, with vertical slats forming the long sides to provide both visibility and ventilation. The headboard and footboard are solid panels with decorative arching tops, accented by a contrasting wood finish along the upper edge. The bed includes a fitted mattress that appears soft and supportive, occupying the entire sleeping area. Below the mattress, there is a spacious pull-out drawer for additional storage, equipped with two round handles for easy access. The overall design is both functional and aesthetically pleasing, with a neutral color palette that would suit a variety of urban interiors. The structure is elevated on four legs, ensuring stability and a slight clearance from the ground.
description: A white and wood-accented infant bed with slatted sides, a decorative arched headboard and footboard, a fitted mattress, and a pull-out storage drawer beneath.
description_view_0: End view showing the solid decorative footboard with an arched wood-accented top and vertical paneling.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the slatted side rails, the full length of the mattress, and the wood-accented headboard and footboard.
description_view_2: Opposite end view highlighting the matching arched headboard with wood accent and solid panel construction.
description_view_3: Side view revealing the slatted rails, mattress, and the pull-out storage drawer with two round handles beneath the bed.
